title: CodCorp Remade
description: An intriguing remake of Cod0fDuty's CodCorp has been crafted with a unique and captivating twist. The gameplay experience offers a refreshing take on the classic title. Explore the world of CodCorp through the provided link to witness its innovative
body:
**REQUIRES MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod: Refurbished beta 5 I can't add it For now im working on it
 (Download it [Here](https://discord.gg/mrcrayfish))**

An exciting remake of Cod0fDuty's [CodCorp](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TypLPqFdxOU) build is now available for exploration! This unique remake offers a fresh take on the classic game. A world download is now provided for an enhanced gaming experience. Stay tuned for potential updates as more features may be added in the future. The modpack includes the world for immersive gameplay. If you encounter any issues or have suggestions, feel free to reach out on [Discord](https://discord.gg/XRgVhZAPgb) to join the community and stay informed about the latest updates.
